name: paperclip-backup
description: Paperclip Backup & Restore plugin — offsite (rclone → Google Drive) and local DB dump management surfaced in the Paperclip UI.
author: Stack-Alerts

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @paperclipai/plugin-sdk ensure-build-deps && pnpm exec esbuild src/worker.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/worker.js --external:electron --external:fsevents && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && node ./scripts/build-ui.mjs
